title: Ghostcraft
description: A chaotic, feature rich overhaul to minecraft.
body:
Ghostcraft is designed to be a complete overhaul of minecrafts combat and overall feel, it makes minecraft more intense and challenging without feeling unforgivable, adding many new things to explore and do.

Ghostcraft is recommended for those wanting a fresh new minecraft experience or who want a fun modpack to play with friends.

Featuring:

- a rudimentary starting class system, open your inventory for the first time to select a starting character.

- new weapons, melee and even guns.

- an overhauled fire system
  
- new mobs everywhere
  
- blood, and ragdoll physics.

- a tuned experience to make mods feel connected, not chaotic and unrelated, while still feeling like a kitchen sink sort of modpack.
